alkylation reagent: alkylated with 40 mM Iodoacetamide for 20 mins RT in the dark.
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 40 mM Iodoacetamide for 20 mins RT in the dark.
instrument: Data were acquired on an Orbitrap Fusion mass spectrometer.
labeling: our cholesterol reporter screens, therefore, provide an extensive overview and unique insight into both known and unknown factors essential for mammalian LDL-cholesterol import.
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM TCEP for 10 mins RT.
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM TCEP for 10 mins RT.
